2026-06-25.patch_summary: This patch updates the x86 Linux kernel to use READ_ONCE and WRITE_ONCE macros for accessing and modifying mm->context.untag_mask, a single aligned word that is written once at LAM enablement time and remains stable thereafter. The changes are made in three files: arch/x86/include/asm/mmu_context.h, arch/x86/include/asm/uaccess_64.h, and arch/x86/kernel/process_64.c. The patch annotates the reads and writes to make lockless access explicit and prevent compiler reloads or tearing of the field. No functional changes are introduced by this patch.
